productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic High Black Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic High shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather upper with perforated side panels for superior breathability and protection from bad odour and sweat Lace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statement Embroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touch High ankle for better support to the lower leg Midsole EVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability Leaf patterened herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the court shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
